company.name: Aporia
company.notes: ML observability. AI-adjacent. | ACQUIRED: Acquired by Coralogix (which is in this DB). ML observability product team merged into Coralogix.

research.status_summary: Fully absorbed — Aporia was acquired by Coralogix on December 23, 2024 for ~$50M; it no longer operates as an independent entity, with aporia.com now redirecting to Coralogix and the team rebranded as 'Coralogix AI.'
research.hiring_policy: Hiring, if any, would be under Coralogix's banner (Coralogix AI R&D center), not Aporia directly; Coralogix has offices in Israel, the US, UK, Germany, and India, but Aporia as a standalone hiring entity is effectively defunct.
recent_news: Acquired by Coralogix on Dec 23, 2024 in a ~$50M cash-and-shares deal; entire Aporia team relocated to Coralogix offices.
Aporia co-founders Liran Hason (CEO) and Alon Gubkin (CTO) now lead 'Coralogix AI,' a dedicated AI R&D center focused on guardrails, monitoring, and AI governance.
Coralogix raised a $115M Series E in mid-2025 at a $1B+ valuation, with a significant portion earmarked to expand the former Aporia team and its AI observability solutions.
aporia.com now auto-redirects to Coralogix; the standalone Aporia brand and product are fully merged into the Coralogix platform.
research.growth_signal: Aporia itself is no longer growing independently — its technology and headcount are absorbed into Coralogix, which doubled down with a $115M Series E and plans to double the team size within two years of the acquisition.
research.fit_for_lior: No longer a viable target as an independent employer; any relevant opportunity would be via Coralogix AI (the successor R&D unit), which is focused on AI guardrails and LLM observability — tangentially relevant to AI-adjacent Product Analyst or Vibe Coder roles but not a creative AI or product-forward environment.
